name: Mongolian Hot Pot
recipeInstructions:
-----------------------DIPPING SAUCE-----------------------
2 tbsp Sesame paste
OR
2 tbsp Peanut butter
1 tbsp Light soy sauce
1 tbsp Rice wine or dry sherry
2 tbsp Chili bean sauce
1 tbsp Sugar
1 cup Hot water
Mix all ingredients for the dipping sauce well.
Using a cleaver or sharp knife, slice the lamb into very thin slices. Soak the noodles in warm water for 5 minutes, then drain and cut into 5-inch lengths. Separate spinach leaves from stalks and wash well; discard stalks. Cut Chinese cabbage into 3-inch pieces. Bring stock to a boil and light the fondue. Ladle stock into the fondue pot and add ginger, scallions, garlic, and cilantro. Each person selects food, cooks quickly in the pot, then adds noodles for final heating before serving soup in bowls. Other foods like steak, fish balls, oysters, shrimp, squid, mushrooms, and lettuce can be added but will not retain Mongolian Hot Pot name.
